experiment_title: 乙烯与溴的四氯化碳溶液反应实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="乙烯与溴的四氯化碳溶液反应实验" goal="观察乙烯气体与溴的四氯化碳溶液反应时颜色由橙色逐渐褪色至无色，验证乙烯的加成反应特性。" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20mL" />
      <Component id="measuring_cylinder_1" type="measuring_cylinder" capacity="25mL" />
      <Component id="ethylene_generator" type="gas_generator" />
      <Component id="rubber_stop_1" type="rubber_stop" />
      <Component id="delivery_tube_1" type="delivery_tube" />
      <Component id="stand" type="stand" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Bromine_CCl4_Solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Ethylene_Gas" state="gas" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="measuring_cylinder_1" reagent="Br2" volume="7 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="measuring_cylinder_1" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="7 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="stand" id="step_2" />
      <Insert tool="delivery_tube_1" vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_3" />
      <Insert tool="rubber_stop_1" vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_4" />
      <Attach vessel="delivery_tube_1" support="ethylene_generator" id="step_5" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="ethylene_generator" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="sufficient" tool="delivery_tube_1" id="step_6" />
      <Wait time="2 min" id="step_7" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 量取溴的四氯化碳溶液并转移至试管，为反应做准备。
组装实验装置：将试管固定在试管架上，插入导气管和橡皮塞，并将导气管与乙烯发生装置连接，确保气体能够顺利通入试管。
通入乙烯气体至试管中的溴的四氯化碳溶液，静置观察颜色变化，验证乙烯的加成反应特性。
